{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Farsight
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Farsight]] is someone who has not eaten or slept for two days.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c1">''The Engineer'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|"Yeah, I’m fine, but Farsight and the others haven’t eaten or slept for two days."<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
